description: A line item for the Drilled Pier summary schedule
title: DrilledPierSummaryItem

Diameter_in.description: The diameter of the drilled pier in inches

Length_ft.description: Total length of this drilled pier in ft

VerticalBars.description: Quantity and size of vertical reinforcement bars for this drilled pier

Ties.description: Size of tie reinforcement bars and spacing for this drilled pier

BasePlateType.description: Baseplate type for this drilled pier

CubicYards.description: cubic yardage of an individual item

Quantity.description: Number of instances of this joist girder type
